title: Cactus Dupe
description: Throw items into a cactus to dupe them!
body:
# Cactus Dupe

This mod lets you dupe with a cactus! Just throw your items onto a cactus to dupe them. It works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Easy early-game dupe mechanic; you can use it in your hardcore world to grind gear, or in your mega survival world to get easy building matierials.

## If you found this mod helpful, please consider donating!

Bitcoin wallet address: `bc1qzhuf0phu508ktrghw3x42cgvp9r7y0m36lt8wp`

<hr>

in honor of Jeremy
